sections.heading: Sampling
sections.text: A practical digital voltage-loop PI implementation for a buck converter often uses a sample time faster than the switching period subdivision already exposed by the control pipeline. Avoid selecting a sample time slower than the dominant output dynamics.

sections.heading: Gain direction
sections.text: If the response is too sluggish and stable, increase proportional gain first, then integral gain. If overshoot rises sharply, back off proportional gain or add current-loop structure instead of only raising integral gain.
